# SettleWire

> Prediction markets news, contextualized. We cluster coverage of each event
> from 90+ outlets, credit the first reporter, and add original analysis of
> why it matters for traders, operators, and regulation watchers. All article
> text is our own original writing; every story links to its primary source.

## Sections
- [Front page](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/index.html)
- [Story archive](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/all.html): every story, searchable
- [The Docket](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/events.html): upcoming court dates, earnings, deadlines
- [RSS feed](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/rss.xml)

## Latest stories
- [Kalshi legitimacy guide targets new prediction market users in 2026](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-legitimacy-guide-targets-new-prediction-market-users-in-2026.html): MLive.com published a consumer explainer in 2026 assessing whether Kalshi is safe and legitimate, aimed at first-time prediction market participants considering the regulated U.S. exchange.
- [Corporate Crackdown Targets Prediction Markets Amid Explosive Growth](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/corporate-crackdown-targets-prediction-markets-amid-explosive-growth.html): Prediction markets are experiencing rapid expansion in 2025, but companies and institutions have begun restricting employee participation, signaling a new wave of corporate resistance to the sector, according to Inc.com.
- [Kalshi Expands Perpetual Contracts as World Cup Markets Set Volume Records](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-expands-perpetual-contracts-as-world-cup-markets-set-volume-records.html): Kalshi has launched an expanded perpetuals product line while World Cup event contracts have driven prediction-market trading volumes to new highs, according to TradingView.
- [Prediction Markets Expand From Elections to Love Island and Gold](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/prediction-markets-expand-from-elections-to-love-island-and-gold.html): Prediction markets have broadened sharply beyond political forecasting into entertainment and commodities contracts, including reality TV outcomes and precious metals prices, according to a new PYMNTS.com analysis.
- [Italy re-blocks Polymarket, prediction market back on banned list](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/italy-re-blocks-polymarket-prediction-market-back-on-banned-list.html): Italian regulators have added Polymarket to the country's blocked-site list for a second time, cutting off access to the U.S.-based prediction market platform for users in Italy.
- [Polymarket launches $50 deposit-match promos tied to World Cup quarterfinals](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-launches-50-deposit-match-promos-tied-to-world-cup-quarterfinals.html): Polymarket is running partner-specific $50 bonus promotions in July 2025, requiring a $20 deposit and unique promo codes, targeting prediction-market activity around 2026 World Cup quarterfinal matches and political events.
- [Polymarket launches margin trading, targeting Hyperliquid liquidity](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-launches-margin-trading-targeting-hyperliquid-liquidity.html): Polymarket introduced margin trading to its prediction-market platform, a structural upgrade that could draw leveraged liquidity away from decentralized derivatives venue Hyperliquid.
- [Kalshi Expands Into Gold and FX Perpetuals Beyond Event Contracts](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/kalshi-expands-into-gold-and-fx-perpetuals-beyond-event-contracts.html): Prediction-market exchange Kalshi is moving beyond its core event-contract business by launching perpetual contracts in gold and foreign exchange markets, broadening its product suite.
- [Polymarket advances U.S. return with new margin trading framework](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/polymarket-advances-u-s-return-with-new-margin-trading-framework.html): Polymarket is moving closer to a formal U.S. relaunch by developing a margin trading plan, marking the prediction market platform's most concrete step yet toward re-entering the American market.
- [Canadians View Prediction Markets as Gambling Despite Sector Growth](https://YOUR_USERNAME.github.io/settlewire/story/canadians-view-prediction-markets-as-gambling-despite-sector-growth.html): A Yahoo! Finance Canada report finds that most Canadians still categorize prediction markets as gambling, even as platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi expand globally in 2025.
